rawAssistant: Those lowland glow spots they've been popping up all over Hollowfen, still casting an otherworldly light on the mist-shrouded paths. Some folks say it's a sign of ancient energies stirring, while others claim it's just the remnants of last night's storm playing tricks on us. Personal opinion? Can't rightly tell, but I do know that if you're planning to head north on this road, finding some clear answers might be your best bet against the dawn.
